channel.title: PineForge Blog
channel.description: Trading strategies, Pine Script tutorials, and algorithmic trading insights from PineForge.

item.title: Trading Psychology: Master Your Mind for Market Success
item.description: Uncover why your mind is your worst enemy in trading. Learn to conquer trading psychology with discipline, strategy, and automation.

item.title: Algorithmic Trading in 2026: The Complete Guide for Retail Traders
item.description: Over 70% of market volume is now driven by algorithms. Here's how retail traders are using algorithmic trading to compete with institutions — no PhD required.

item.title: Backtesting Trading Strategies: The Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Would you invest $10,000 in a strategy you've never tested? Backtesting validates your ideas on historical data before a single dollar is at risk.

item.title: Pine Script Tutorial: Write Your First Trading Strategy in 10 Minutes
item.description: Pine Script is the world's most popular language for trading strategies. This hands-on tutorial takes you from zero to a working automated strategy.

item.title: Trading Bots: How They Work, Why They Win, and How to Deploy One
item.description: A trading bot executes your strategy 24/7 without emotion. Learn how bots work under the hood, their advantages over manual trading, and how to set one up in minutes.

item.title: Risk Management for Traders: The Rules That Keep You in the Game
item.description: Most traders obsess over entries. Professionals obsess over risk. Learn the risk management strategies that separate consistent winners from blown accounts.

item.title: Gold Trading Strategies for XAUUSD: 4 Proven Approaches for 2026
item.description: Gold is one of the most traded instruments on Earth. Here are 4 backtested XAUUSD strategies you can deploy as automated trading bots today.

item.title: Forex vs Crypto for Trading Bots: Which Market Should You Automate?
item.description: Forex offers tight spreads and deep liquidity. Crypto offers 24/7 access and high volatility. Compare both markets to find the best fit for your trading bot.

item.title: How to Build Your First Trading Bot: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: From zero to a live automated trading bot in under 10 minutes. No coding experience? No problem. This walkthrough covers everything.

item.title: Trading Indicators Explained: RSI, MACD, EMA, Bollinger Bands & ATR
item.description: A clear, practical guide to the most important trading indicators. Learn what they measure, when to use them, and how to code them in Pine Script.

item.title: Automated Trading vs Manual Trading: The Data-Driven Verdict
item.description: Speed, discipline, consistency, coverage — automated trading wins on almost every metric. Here's the head-to-head comparison with data to back it up.
